case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. NICHOLAS R. PERKINS et al

docket_entries.description: CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PERKINS, NICHOLAS R. INDIVIDUALLY  AND DBA MALLARD FOREST PRODUCTS PERKINS, NICKY L. INDIVIDUALLY  AND DBA MALLARD FOREST PRODUCTS POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: ONE 2007 EVANS PLANTATION TRAILER S/N B271003950, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $19,072.99 DAMAGES, $2,250.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $350.00 COSTS, $915.25 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $22,588.24, PROPERTY FAIR MARKET VALUE $11,000.000 SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-29-2008 CONTINUED TO NOV-14-2008 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST SERVED MAY-22-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PERKINS, NICHOLAS R. INDIVIDUALLY  AND DBA MALLARD FOREST PRODUCTS

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $350.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT PERKINS, NICHOLAS R. INDIVIDUALLY  AND DBA MALLARD FOREST PRODUCTS PERKINS, NICKY L. INDIVIDUALLY  AND DBA MALLARD FOREST PRODUCTS
DECLARATION OF DOUGLAS HOLLOWAY IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 HOURS
